summary: Bug fix verified: Registration now correctly calls POST /api/auth/register instead of login. New users can register with fresh email, are auto-logged in, and redirected to /dashboard. No regression on existing admin login. Duplicate email registration returns proper error message.
passed: Backend POST /api/auth/register with new email returns 200 with user object
Backend POST /api/auth/register with existing email (admin@kostcharge.com) returns 400 'Email already registered'
UI: Login page loads with email/password inputs
UI: Toggle 'Don't have an account? Register' shows Name field
UI: Registering new user (uitest_<ts>@example.com) auto-logs in and redirects to /dashboard (verified 'UI Test User' shown in header)
UI: Existing admin login (admin@kostcharge.com/admin123) still works and redirects to /dashboard
UI: Duplicate email registration displays inline error 'Email already registered'
notes: Minor non-blocking: console shows WebSocket warning (socket.io) and 401 on /api/auth/me before login - expected behavior. Bug fix at Login.js line 30 is confirmed working end-to-end.
